query:
SELECT o.id, o.customerName, o.deliveryTeacher, o.paymentAmount, o.createdAt
FROM orders o
WHERE 
  (o.customerName LIKE '%test%' 
  OR o.deliveryTeacher LIKE '%test%'
  OR o.customerName LIKE '%ćµ‹čŻ•%'
  OR o.deliveryTeacher LIKE '%ćµ‹čŻ•%')
ORDER BY o.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 50;
